description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc that triggers on repository dispatches of types package-master and package-release, on pull requests to any branch, and on push events to any branch with a tag matching v*, ignoring certain paths. Use a job that calls a reusable workflow from jrl-umi3218/github-actions with specific parameters, including dependencies, ROS integration, and a matrix strategy for different distributions and architectures.
